title: T-032 — UI: TEC-010 Item List page
prompt:
# T-032 — UI: TEC-010 Item List page

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §6.5, §4A TEC-010
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:432-480` (materials_list_screen)

## Goal
Item list page with filters, search, pagination — parity with materials_list_screen prototype.

Parity checklist: 1) Top filter row order: Type | Status | Allergens | D365 Sync | Search; 2) Table columns: Code | Name | Type | Status | Allergens (chips) | Cost/kg | D365 status | Updated; 3) Empty state copy + Add button match prototype; 4) Use shadcn Table, Input, Select primitives — no <select>; 5) Action button 'Create item' top-right opens TEC-011 modal.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/(app)/technical/items/page.tsx [create]
- app/(app)/technical/items/_components/item-table.tsx [create]
- app/(app)/technical/items/_components/item-filters.tsx [create]
- tests/ui/tec-010-item-list.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx [ref]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/data-screens.jsx [ref]

## Out of scope
- Item create modal (T-033)
- Item detail (T-034)
- CSV import (T-068 docs)

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:432-480 and prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/data-screens.jsx:4-52, then it shows structural parity (same filter row order, same table columns, same Create button placement), visual parity (shadcn Input/Select/Table primitives, same density tokens), and interaction parity (filter chips toggle, row click opens detail, empty-state matches) — verified by RTL snapshot + manual checklist in details.
2. Given filters Type=fg + Status=active are selected, when applied, then the API receives ?type=fg&status=active and table reloads.
3. Given empty result, when rendered, then the prototype empty-state copy and 'Create item' CTA appear.
4. Given user lacks technical.items.create, when page renders, then the Create button is hidden.
5. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy
- RED tests asserting prototype parity (snapshot diff + DOM checks against checklist).
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-010-item-list.test.tsx
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not use raw <select> instead of shadcn Select.
- Do not invent extra columns beyond prototype.
- Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to production shadcn primitives per `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md`.
- Do not use raw HTML <select> — use shadcn Select.
- Do not use inline styles — use Tailwind classes; conditional via cn()/cva().
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (ESLint guard).

## Prototype parity
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:432-480` (materials_list_screen) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Evidence policy: `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` — closeout must include screenshot artifacts + Playwright trace/video where applicable, plus axe results or documented blocker.
